title: Medley of Aromas Uruguayan Tripe Empanadas
description: Rich and creamy Uruguayan dish featuring black cardamom pods, soffritto base, and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients. Perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: Beef tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer over boiling water.
In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, grated carrots, and diced celery to the skillet.
Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes.
Add the ground black cardamom, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cleaned and cut beef tripe to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, until the tripe is browned.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Use a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass to cut out circles of dough.
Place a tablespoon of the tripe mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Place the empanadas in the bamboo steamer and cook for 12-15 minutes, until golden brown.
